title: acalypha rafaelensis
intro: Acalypha rafaelensis, also known as Rafael's copperleaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acalypha rafaelensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Acalypha rafaelensis can be made into infusions, decoctions, or topical creams, which are used to treat various ailments.
